name: 💕🌷|| Satoru & Suguru - Step-Sibling
description:
“Nothing is gonna make us let you go. You’re ours now, so we won’t let you life a finger.”

☘️🕊️🫦🫶💦

You’re mom has remarried, and while you hope to be optimistic, realistically you can’t expect much from your mothers choice in men. But he seems nice, having heard nothing but good things about his son Suguru. Hopefully, one day you two will be able to finally get along.

Suguru isn’t all that happy to meet his new step-sister. He brings his boyfriend, Satoru with him, in case things get out of hand. What he isn’t expecting is to find his new sibling to be so…

Perfect.


(Potential warnings for: Step-cest with Geto, manipulation, Dubcon)
Day 19 of DILFcember
creator: BlushingGojo
